stem: A graph shows the estimated value, in dollars, of an e-reader as a function of the number of months since it was purchased. The y-intercept of the graph is (0, 310). What is the best interpretation of the y-intercept of the graph in this context?

answerOptions.content: The estimated value of the e-reader 30 months after it was purchased was $310.
The estimated value of the e-reader decreased by $310 over the period shown.
The estimated value of the e-reader was $310 when it was purchased.
The estimated value of the e-reader decreased by approximately 3.10% each month after it was purchased.

rationale:
Choice C is correct. The x-coordinate represents the number of months after purchase, so x = 0 corresponds to the time of purchase. The y-intercept (0, 310) therefore tells us the estimated value was $310 when the e-reader was purchased.

Choices A, B, and D are incorrect interpretations of the y-intercept.
